title: You Got Gold: A Celebration of John Prine
original_title: You Got Gold: A Celebration of John Prine
overview: This concert film was shot in October, 2022, over two nights at the Ryman Auditorium in Nashville, TN. More than 70 artists gathered with family, the Nashville community, and music fans to remember and pay tribute to the life and songs of John Prine.
